title: How LLM training signals shifted beyond the pretraining corpus
description: A conceptual timeline of how modern language-model training mixes corpus pretraining with instruction data, preference feedback, verifiable RL, synthetic traces, and distillation loops.
contextSentence: Modern LLM training is no longer explained by web-scale pretraining alone — post-training and feedback signals now share the stage.
takeaway: Treat pretraining as the foundation, but expect instruction tuning, preference optimization, verifiable RL, synthetic data, and distillation-style loops to shape the final model you deploy.

conceptualChart.title: Conceptual chart
conceptualChart.body: The stacked areas use default illustrative values bundled at build time. They are meant to communicate direction and relative emphasis, not quantitative market shares of training data.
